ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "claim_text" TEXT /* Text of the claim being fact-checked */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was submitted */,
  "originated" TEXT /* Geographic origin of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., pending, verified, debunked) */,
  "final_label" TEXT /* Final label assigned to the claim (e.g., true, false, missing context) */,
  "fact_check_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fact-checking agency assigned to verify the claim */,
  "submitted_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the claim */,
  "poynter_url" TEXT /* URL to the Poynter fact-checking page for the claim */,
  "claim_language" TEXT /* Language of the claim */,
  "claim_source" TEXT /* Primary source of the claim */,
  "claim_importance" INTEGER /* Importance of the claim */,
  "claim_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from fact-checkers */,
  "claim_version" INTEGER /* Version of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_submitted_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_final_label FOREIGN KEY ("final_label") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_fact_check_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("fact_check_agency_id") REFERENCES fact_check_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES claim_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fact_check_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fact-checking agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the fact-checking agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the agency's website */,
  "agency_country" TEXT /* Country of the agency */,
  "agency_established" INTEGER /* Year the agency was established */,
  "agency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "agency_specialization" TEXT /* Areas of specialization of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., submitter, fact-checker, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_language" TEXT /* Language of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, verified, debunked) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_order" INTEGER /* Order of the status in the verification process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., true, false, missing context) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "label_color" TEXT /* Color for visual representation in the UI */,
  "label_icon" TEXT /* Icon for visual representation in the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the source is associated with */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., article, expert statement) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description or content of the source */,
  "source_title" TEXT /* Title of the source */,
  "source_author" TEXT /* Author of the source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date of the source */,
  "source_relevance" INTEGER /* Relevance of the source to the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_sources_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., initial, final) */,
  "review_confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the review */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the reviewer */,
  "review_version" INTEGER /* Version of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_reviews_reviewer_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_reviews_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., vaccines, public health policies) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* Icon for visual representation in the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "mapping_weight" INTEGER /* Weight or importance of the category for the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_category_mapping_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES claim_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., Kenya, South Africa) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  "origin_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the origin */,
  "origin_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the origin */,
  "origin_icon" TEXT /* Icon for visual representation in the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_origin_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin */,
  "mapping_weight" INTEGER /* Weight or importance of the origin for the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_origin_mapping_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES claim_origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_origin_mapping_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the claim */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, submit, review) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the claim */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., submitter, fact-checker, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "role_icon" TEXT /* Icon for visual representation in the UI */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
